title: Verify existing implementation of cache wrapper
description: The task requires creating `withCache<T>(key: string, ttlMs: number, fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>` in `src/services/cache-wrapper.ts` with tests. The implementation already exists with 9 passing tests covering: first call caching, TTL expiry, different keys, different result types, array results, clearCache for specific keys, clearCache for all keys, and non-existent key handling. No further work needed.
existing_patterns: src/services/cache-wrapper.ts uses in-memory Map with TTL expiry, matching the task requirements exactly
